name: PayFit
description: PayFit payroll and HR management platform for European teams

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to PayFit
2. Go to Settings → Integrations → API
3. Generate an API token
4. Paste it below

credentialFields.label: API Token
credentialFields.helpText: PayFit → Settings → Integrations → API → Generate token

checks.name: Employee Access
checks.description: Lists PayFit employees to verify payroll access is managed
